response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for both '怪獣の花唄' and '初恋サイダー'. The video covers the final chorus of the first song, an intermission with dialogue, and the full performance of the second song. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, with mid-sentence pauses handled by splitting blocks.

subtitles.original: 口ずさんでしまうよ
subtitles.english: I'll end up humming along.

subtitles.original: ねぇ、僕ら
subtitles.english: Hey, we...

subtitles.original: （眠れない夜に）手を伸ばして
subtitles.english: Reach out to the (sleepless nights),

subtitles.original: （眠らない夜を）また伸ばして
subtitles.english: Stretching out the (nights without sleep) again,

subtitles.original: （眠くない まだね）そんな日々でいたいのにな
subtitles.english: I want to stay in days like those (I'm not sleepy yet).

subtitles.original: 懲りずに（眠れない夜に）手を伸ばして
subtitles.english: Unwearied, reach out to the (sleepless nights),

subtitles.original: （眠らない夜を）また伸ばして
subtitles.english: Stretching out the (nights without sleep) again,

subtitles.original: （眠くない まだね）そんな夜に歌う 怪獣の歌
subtitles.english: Singing the Kaiju's song in a night like this.

subtitles.original: （落ちていく過去は鮮明で）
subtitles.english: (The falling past is vivid,)

subtitles.original: 見せたい未来は繊細で
subtitles.english: The future I want to show is delicate,

subtitles.original: すぎていく日々には鈍感な君へ
subtitles.english: To you, who are insensitive to the passing days.

subtitles.original: 王様ゲームの時のがちゃんとシーンになっててよかった
subtitles.english: I'm glad the King Game part turned into a proper scene.

subtitles.original: 今日はかっこいいって言ってもらえそう
subtitles.english: I think people will call me cool today.

subtitles.original: かっこよかった、かっこよかった！
subtitles.english: You were cool, so cool!

subtitles.original: ちょっと棒なのやめてもらっていい？
subtitles.english: Can you stop being so monotone?

subtitles.original: 歌はかっこよかった
subtitles.english: The singing was cool.

subtitles.original: 可愛い、エモかったね
subtitles.english: Cute, it was emotional, right?

subtitles.original: よし、じゃあ次どっちいくかな
subtitles.english: Alright, who's going next?

subtitles.original: いきます！
subtitles.english: Here I go!

subtitles.original: わー、大好き！
subtitles.english: Wow, I love this!

subtitles.original: 本当に好き！
subtitles.english: I really love it!

subtitles.original: 緊張する、頑張る！
subtitles.english: I'm nervous, I'll do my best!

subtitles.original: 神曲！
subtitles.english: God-tier song!

subtitles.original: 神曲来ちゃう！神曲来ちゃう！
subtitles.english: A god-tier song is coming! It's coming!

subtitles.original: 頑張る！さすがにペンライト
subtitles.english: I'll do my best! Definitely need penlights.

subtitles.original: 「キスをあげるよ」 今気付いた想い
subtitles.english: "I'll give you a kiss" These feelings I just noticed,

subtitles.original: どんな言葉でも 足りないから
subtitles.english: Because no matter what words I use, they're not enough.

subtitles.original: One, two, three, four!
subtitles.english: One, two, three, four!

subtitles.original: 当たり前すぎるぐらい 友達の時間が長かったせいで
subtitles.english: Because we've been friends for so long,

subtitles.original: あなたのクセや性格だって 他の子より知ってんの
subtitles.english: I know your habits better than anyone else.

subtitles.original: Ha~ 意気地なしで
subtitles.english: Ha~ Being a coward...

subtitles.original: 恥ずかしがり屋な
subtitles.english: ...and a shy person,

subtitles.original: あなたをもう待ってられないの
subtitles.english: I can't wait for you any longer.

subtitles.original: 「キスをあげるよ」 今さら「好き」なんて
subtitles.english: "I'll give you a kiss" Saying "I love you" now...

subtitles.original: 言葉より キキメあるでしょ？
subtitles.english: ...is more effective than words, right?

subtitles.original: あなたにだけは そっと教えてあげる
subtitles.english: Only to you, I'll quietly tell you.

subtitles.original: 胸の奥 小さいつぼみのぬくもり
subtitles.english: The warmth of a small bud deep inside my heart.

subtitles.original: 時々甘えてみたり
subtitles.english: Sometimes acting spoiled,

subtitles.original: 拗ねてみたり そんな作戦らしくない
subtitles.english: Acting petulant... such tactics aren't like me.

subtitles.original: か弱きオトメじゃ勝てないの この恋だけは負けられない
subtitles.english: A frail maiden can't win; I can't lose this love.

subtitles.original: Ha~ 鈍感なあなたのこと
subtitles.english: Ha~ You, who are so insensitive,

subtitles.original: 振り向かせたいから 勝負かけるの
subtitles.english: I want you to notice me, so I'm taking a chance.

subtitles.original: 「キスをあげるよ」 『愛してます』なんて
subtitles.english: "I'll give you a kiss" Saying "I love you"...

subtitles.original: 言葉より 魅力的でしょ？
subtitles.english: ...is more charming than words, right?

subtitles.original: 聞こえちゃうぐらい 速くなるドキドキ
subtitles.english: My heart is beating so fast you can almost hear it.

subtitles.original: 初恋は サイダーみたいに弾ける
subtitles.english: First love pops like cider.

subtitles.original: “友達同士” そんな境界線
subtitles.english: The boundary of being "just friends",

subtitles.original: 今すぐに 飛び越えたいの
subtitles.english: I want to leap over it right now.

subtitles.original: 「キスをあげるよ」 今さら「好き」なんて
subtitles.english: "I'll give you a kiss" Saying "I love you" now...

subtitles.original: 言葉より キキメあるでしょ？
subtitles.english: ...is more effective than words, right?

subtitles.original: あなたにだけは そっと教えてあげる
subtitles.english: Only to you, I'll quietly tell you.

subtitles.original: 胸の奥 小さいつぼみのぬくもり感じて
subtitles.english: Feel the warmth of a small bud deep inside my heart.
